    $value[5]['tenant_popup_desc_id']
    <p>Lihat jadwal di bawah ini untuk mengetahui lokasi fotografer Fodegraf kami sepanjang hari.</p><h4>Hari Kerja (Senin–Jumat)</h4><ul><li>10.00 - 12.00 di <strong>King Of River</strong></li><li>12.00 - 17.00 di <strong>Yellow Submarine</strong></li><li>18.00 - 21.00 di <strong>Sea Tunnel</strong></li></ul><h4>Akhir Pekan (Sabtu–Minggu)</h4><ul><li>9.30 - 12.30 di <strong>Lobi Utama Anemone</strong></li><li>12.30 - 18.00 di <strong>Yellow Submarine</strong></li><li>18.00 - 21.00 di <strong>Sea Theatre</strong></li></ul><p><strong>*Untuk rombongan sekolah dan kelompok dengan lansia, harap melakukan pemesanan terlebih dahulu. Kami akan bersiaga di Lobi Anemone sebelumnya.</strong></p><p><br></p>

    <p>Check out the schedule below to learn where our Fodegraf photographer is located throughout the day.</p><p><strong>Weekday (Monday-Friday)</strong></p><ul><li>10.00 -12.00 at <strong>King Of River</strong></li><li>12.00 - 17.00 at <strong>Yellow Submarine</strong> </li><li>18.00 - 21.00 at <strong>Sea Tunnel</strong></li></ul><p><strong>Weekend (Saturday–Sunday)</strong></p><ul><li>9.30 - 12.30 at <strong>Main Lobby Anemone</strong> </li><li>12.30 - 18.00 at <strong>Yellow Submarine</strong> </li><li>18.00 - 21.00 at <strong>Sea Theatre</strong></li></ul><p><strong>*For school groups and groups with seniors, please book in advance. We will be on standby at the Lobby Anemone beforehand. </strong></p>

    tenant_desc => string (321) "<p>Dapatkan lukisan tangan dan wajah dari seniman residen kami yang berbakat...
    $value[6]['tenant_desc']
    <p>Dapatkan lukisan tangan dan wajah dari seniman residen kami yang berbakat! Lanjutkan perjalanan Anda dengan penuh warna</p><p>Cat neon kami menyala sempurna di bawah pencahayaan biru gelap BXSea dan instalasi imersif Kelana Kaia. Jangan khawatir dengan noda atau percikan, karena tintanya sangat mudah dibersihkan!</p>
    tenant_desc_en => UTF-8 string (307) "<p>Get your hand and face painted by our talented resident artist! Continue ...
    $value[6]['tenant_desc_en']
    <p>Get your hand and face painted by our talented resident artist! Continue your journey bright with colour. </p><p>Our neon paints glows perfectly under BXSea’s dark blue lighting, as well as Kelana Kaia’s immersive installation. Do not mind stains or splatters, for the ink washes off easily!</p>
